hook.summary: Fast-paced FPS gameplay montage featuring shotgun and sniper kills.
hook.visual_action: First-person perspective of a player shooting enemies in a wooden building, switching weapons rapidly.

scene_flow: Close-range shotgun combat inside a wooden barn structure.
Transition to sniper scope view for a long-distance headshot through a window.
Assault rifle gameplay with red dot sight targeting enemies in a courtyard.
Suppressed pistol kill at close range.
End card reveal with game title, characters, and a call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: Competitive mobile gamers who enjoy stylized, low-poly first-person shooters.
